$comment: Damage calcs you must DEAL. Atoms: koes, dealsDamage. Assertions: count, coverage (meta group auto-resolved from usage). A Threat is a full set usable on either side; its `move` field applies only when it attacks (survives), so as a koes/dealsDamage TARGET it just supplies defensive bulk.
name: Offensive calcs

tests.title: 2HKO every top-10 threat
tests.rationale: For each meta top-10 mon, >=1 member guarantees a 2HKO (koes hits:2, roll:min). The report's coverage.uncovered is the offensive gap.

tests.title: Someone guarantees an OHKO on Flutter Mane
tests.rationale: koes hits:1 roll:min = guaranteed KO even on the low roll.

tests.title: Someone deals >=50% to Incineroar
tests.rationale: Finer than a KO check: dealsDamage with a fraction threshold on the low roll.
